title: Opening for Medical Officer at Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited:
Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited!
